# Web Platform Test Fixtures

The files in this folder are a subset of the [Web Platform Tests][] fixtures
vendored by Node.js in `test/fixtures/wpt`, copied verbatim for the vendored
Node.js test suite in `test/js/node/test`.

Last update:

- url/resources: https://github.com/web-platform-tests/wpt/tree/9504a83e01/url/resources

[Web Platform Tests]: https://github.com/web-platform-tests/wpt
